## Verification

- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit`

## Risk areas

Check any that apply:

- [ ] auth
- [ ] marketplace or payments
- [ ] revenue or collaborator policy
- [ ] ranking/scoring
- [ ] Supabase migration / RLS
- [ ] cron / automation
- [ ] security-sensitive behavior
